name: Mexican Pork Roast Cooked in Beer w/ Green Sa
recipeIngredient: 5 lb pork loin or shoulder roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. In a large Dutch oven, brown the pork roast on all sides.
3. Add onions, carrots, salt, oregano, and coriander; cook for 5 minutes.
4. Pour in beer; bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 3-4 hours or until tender.
6. Prepare green sauce: In a blender, puree onion, garlic, tomatillos, oregano, cilantro, salt, pepper, and 1/2 cup beer juice.
7. Pour sauce over pork; stir to combine.
8. Return to oven and bake for 30 minutes more or until heated through.
9. Remove from oven; let rest for 10 minutes before slicing and serving with rice or bread.
